description: Post-implementation coverage for IFC-248 (Lead List & Create Page Tests). Test-authoring only — NO production code changed. Primary target apps/web/src/components/leads/lead-list.tsx lifted from ~37% to 100% statements / 100% lines / 81.2% branches / 98.8% functions via the extended lead-list.test.tsx (filtering/sorting/bulk-ops/row-actions/gating/badges/cell-render). New apps/web/src/app/leads/(list)/LeadsPageClient.tsx isolation test → 100% stmt/func/lines. T7 role filter pinned at the API level via lead.router.security.test.ts T-012 (no coverage-delta target).
command: cd apps/web && npx vitest run "src/components/leads/__tests__/lead-list.test.tsx" "src/app/leads/(list)/__tests__/LeadsPageClient.test.tsx" --coverage --coverage.include='src/components/leads/lead-list.tsx' (LeadsPageClient measured separately with --coverage.include='src/app/leads/*/LeadsPageClient.tsx')

apps/web/src/components/leads/lead-list..note: Exceeds thresholds (stmt>=90, lines>=90, branch>=80, func>=90). Single residual uncovered fn is the LeadAvatar colour helper branch — non-behavioural.

apps/web/src/app/leads/(list)/LeadsPageC.note: Thin wrapper fully exercised by the new isolation test.

notes: lead-list.test.tsx grew from 22 to 54 tests (+32) across filtering/sorting, bulk operations, row actions/gating/cell rendering, and misc interaction handlers.
LeadsPageClient.test.tsx adds 3 tests; lead.router.security.test.ts adds 2 (T-012 ADMIN/USER role filter).
No production source modified → Sonar new_coverage has no changed production lines (gate trivially satisfied); the binding metric is the whole-file coverage above.
